text.title: AI Content Quality Review Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply AI Content Quality Review end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: section-scan
step.action: Score each of 7 sections with rubric.

step.name: citation-verify
step.action: Run citation-verifier.py; reject 404s and unmatched claims.
